description: Add interactive orbit controls (mouse/touch) so observers can navigate around the 3D form
context: Layer 1 was the particle/ring foundation (C1). Layer 2 was ring depth, HUD fields, lerp refinement (C2). Layer 3 is interaction — the form should respond to the observer's gaze direction, not just broadcast at them. Also consider: mouse-over reveals particle-level state info (tooltip). Next candidate after that: pattern evolution tracking (reinforcement counts).
